case_title: MICHAEL SUBBA VS. FORT KNOX SELF STORAGE DBA KDM INVESTMENT CO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SUBBA, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT KDM INVESTMENT CO DBA FORT KNOX SELF STORAGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-11-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF. AMENDING DEFENDANT FROM FORT KNOX SELF STORAGE DBA KDM INVESTMENT CO TO KDM INVESTMENT CO DBA FORT KNOX SELF STORAG - 2ND AMENDMENT - FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUBBA, MICHAEL
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 11/08/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - UNDELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
DECLARATION RE: AMENDMENT OF SECTION THREE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUBBA, MICHAEL
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUBBA, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT KDM INVESTMENT CO DBA FORT KNOX SELF STORAGE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-11-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-19-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF MICHAEL SUBBA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT KDM INVESTMENT CO DBA FORT KNOX SELF STORAGE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUBBA, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KDM INVESTMENT CO DBA FORT KNOX SELF STORAGE $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,090.00, UNDER CIVIL CODE 50, DEFENDANT MAY USE FORCE TO EJECT A TRESPASSER. PLAINTIFF REFUSED A LAWFUL ORDER TO LEAVE. BUT DEFENDANT MAY ONLY USE REASONABLE FORCE. HERE I FIND THAT THE GARAGE VIDEO AT THE 5-SECOND MARK DEPICTS A GRATUITOUS AND UNREASONABLE USE OF FORCE. I AWARD DAMAGES FOR THE REPLACEMENT OF PLAINTIFF'S GLASSES AND AN ESTIMATE OF MEDICAL AND PAIN AND SUFFERING COST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

DECLARATION OF MICHAEL SUBBA RE: RESET FORM SC-150 USED FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUBBA, MICHAEL
